RT by @lookner: This afternoon, two people were stabbed in separate attacks on the Upper West Side. Both victims — an Asian male and a Jewish male — were removed to Mt. Sinai-St. Luke’s Hospital, and both are expected to survive.  The NYPD has arrested 51-year-old Raul Morales in connection with both assaults, and no other people are being sought. Detectives are continuing to work the case and determine motive, but according to victim and witness statements, Morales yelled “Allahu Akbar” during both attacks. The NYPD is currently evaluating whether this is a potential hate crime. While the perpetrator has no known mental health history with the NYPD, the initial investigation suggests that mental health may have been a factor. At this time there is no known link between Morales and either of the victims, nor between the victims and each other. I want to commend the bravery of a good Samaritan who led our officers to the location where the perpetrator was hiding, as well as our NYPD cops who brought an end to the incident without further injuries.

Pakistani 🇵🇰 military chief Asim Munir launched a joint venture with IRGC chief Ahmad Vahidi late last year, alleges @TimesofIsrael. The venture has quietly transported Iranian 🇮🇷 oil to Pakistan and paid "massive dividends" to Munir and Vahidi. Munir has allegedly leveraged this venture to benefit Saudi Arabia 🇸🇦, which Pakistan hopes to boost ties with. Munir warned Vahidi that continued attacks on Saudi Arabia could jeopardize the arrangement, and Iran's attacks on Saudi Arabia stopped. Munir personally played a major role in Islamabad's mediating efforts between the US 🇺🇸 and Iran. In other words: The lead mediator in Iran-US negotiations was/is allegedly helping the IRGC evade US oil export sanctions, undermining US leverage and likely influencing negotiations to advance his personal financial interests.

Big problem for everyone in Ukraine is that large mechanized assaults are always detected and start getting engaged way in the rear and the entire time they’re driving towards the front. So that could be 30 minutes (and in many cases much longer). So you not only need to survive the approach to the contact line, you need to survive the actual assault itself. Then you need to try and withdraw. Better to treat a lot of armor as a single-use item unless you can reliably knock down enemy UAS for some or all phases.

Israel's 🇮🇱 Mossad and Shin Bet thwarted an Iranian 🇮🇷attempt to assemble a cell to assassinate senior Israeli officials. French 🇫🇷 resident "Philip" (Thurot Ozkur) was recruited by "Babak (Baba Mahou-Zadeh Haji Jafan) and "Nedim" (Mehmet Nedim Yigit), operating on behalf of the Iranian Ministry of Intelligence, to recruit a cell of foreign nationals to infiltrate into Israel. Their handlers have been identified as Assadollah Behzad Okhsari, Vahid Masoumi, Mohammad-Hossein Zoghi, and Hamid Ghasemi. Okhsari reportedly played a central role in Iranian efforts to attack Jewish and Israeli targets worldwide. He was reportedly killed during Israel's Operation Roaring Lion. The two Iranians are linked to Iranian drug lord Naji Sharifi Zindashti, who is wanted by the US 🇺🇸 for conspiring to kill two Iranians defectors living in Maryland. Philip was reportedly expelled from France because of his involvement in planning attacks on behalf of Iran. Babak and Nedim continue to attempt to activate terror cells from Iran.
